title: Updates/connect boards
excerpt:
Hi. 
I’m connecting items to different boards and pulling through mirror columns. 
The only thing I’m missing and is quite important is the updates. Is there anyway the updates can be pulled across as well?

posts.author: SteveRickwood (Steven Rickwood )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi.

I’m connecting items to different boards and pulling through mirror columns.

The only thing I’m missing and is quite important is the updates. Is there anyway the updates can be pulled across as well?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: There’s an app you can use called Same Item Multiple Boards that will do that. OR you could have a column on the source board that uses AI to summarize the updates and then mirror that column to the new board.
